name: Louisville
author: soccerjonj
description:
Custom map of the Louisville, KY area and surrounding towns. Generated using 2023 LODES Census Data and added demand for the following:

Universities: University of Louisville, Bellarmine University, Spalding University, Indiana University-Southeast, Sullivan University, Jefferson Community and Technical College, The Southern Baptist Theological Seminary, Ivy Tech Community College-South Central

Entertainment: Louisville Zoo, Lynn Family Stadium, Louisville Slugger Field, Churchill Downs, L&N Federal Credit Union Stadium, KFC Yum! Center, Kentucky Derby Museum, Muhammad Ali Center, Louisville Slugger Museum & Factory, Lousville Exposition Center
